channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iran’s strategic patience tactic failed, what comes next could be far worse
item.description: Restraint didn't prevent war; new Iranian leadership may now look to much more dangerous approach to build a deterrent.

item.title: Video: North Korea conducts cruise missile test for destroyer
item.description: Cruise missiles were seen launching into the sky as North Korean leader Kim Jong Un oversaw naval tests.

item.title: Europe’s hard right fractures over US-Israel war on Iran
item.description: Far-right forces are split over nationalism, foreign policy and ties to US President Donald Trump.

item.title: Al Jazeera reports from Israeli bombing of Beirut apartment block
item.description: Al Jazeera’s Zeina Khodr reports from the site of an Israeli strike on a residential building in central Beirut.

item.title: Damage caused to buildings in Tehran following US-Israeli strikes
item.description: Video shows the destruction caused to buildings in Iran’s capital after a reported strike near Mehrabad airport.

item.title: Israel pounds Lebanon, targets residential building in central Beirut
item.description: The strike in a densely populated area appears to be another attempted assassination, with no information yet on target.

item.title: Israeli strikes hit Beirut suburbs
item.description: This is the moment an Israeli air attack hit a residential area in Beirut’s southern suburbs.

item.title: Iran fires missiles, drones at Gulf nations as ship hit in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Tehran keeps up daily pressure as UNSC readies vote on GCC bid urging Iran to halt attacks on neighbours.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 12 of US-Israel attacks?
item.description: Iran says more than 1,300 civilians have been killed and nearly 10,000 civilian sites have been hit by Israel and US.

item.title: ‘The other side’ of IITs: Student suicides haunt India’s top tech schools
item.description: Nearly 160 deaths recorded across the premier engineering colleges in past two decades - 69 of them in last five years.
